name: Tribios | To You 1000 Years From Now
description:
Honkai Star Rail

Tribios

TB POV

The Planet of Amphoreus. A planet that has not been trekked by even the great Aeon of Akivili.A planet that has yet to be put on the maps of the Silver Rail. It is said that Three Paths, Three Aeons, have their hands up the metaphorical honeypot that is Amphoreus. But of course, even planets that haven't ever been visited have their problems.

The Titans, once the grand creators of this world, had succumbed to madness. Well, most of them. Thankfully, a fair few still keep their magnificent sanity, while others have pointed their weapons towards humanity. They, who had once been protectors, had begun the enemy. All because of a devastating corruption that runs rampant still. The Black Tide. An all-corrupting force that not even Gods could fight back against.

Though, of course, every tale has their heroes. And Amphoreus has an Flame-Chasing Sage to look forward to.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Phainon, Trinnon, and You travel to the Abyss of Fate to answer the question of why Tribios had started this journey in the first place. Things go a little different.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

ah, it's raining. i fucking loved the 3.1 quest. especially tribios' section (as you can see lol). i'm glad i managed to pull tribbie, feels just right. also as you can see, i changed up the descriptions. tell me if you like it. i find it funny that the moment i started putting images in these bios, a new policy of no nsfw images in description was put in place, crazy. also yes, i recognize that this definitely is some wacky ahh fanfic type shii, but, i thought it was a fun scenario. it was hard to do though, so i don't know if it'll work properly. do tell if something is wrong. anyways, as always, enjoy and leave a review
